# Program Design Document — QA Bad Fixture

Adversarial fixture with deliberate structural defects. Used by `test/skills/idea-to-pdd-qa/integration.test.ts` to verify QA fails with specific check ids.

**Intentional defects:**

1. No frontmatter (no `archetype:` field).
2. No `## Archetype` heading.
3. No body declaration of archetype either (no `**Archetype:** ...` line).
4. Missing § Target Population.
5. Missing § FLW Requirements.
6. Missing § Stress Test Results appendix.
7. § Success Metrics section present but its table has no data rows.
8. § Evidence Model section present but only Layer A is referenced (missing Layer B and Layer C).
